title: GATE-4-FIX-V2 deploy pending
objective:

NL = "\n"
queue_path = Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if queue_path.exists() else {'tasks': []}
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'GATE-4-TEST-V2':
        task['status'] = 'WAITING_DENO_DEPLOY'
        task['blocker'] = 'Live Deno health still reports version 4.9 after repo patch; wait for Deno Deploy to pick up 8cba218e7a842e7f8baf7d0a145b0e7978a0e93f or redeploy manually'
        task['test_instruction'] = 'Send Telegram test only after health version is 4.10 or deployment confirms latest commit'
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T16:24:00Z'
queue['queue_state'] = 'WAITING_DENO_DEPLOY'
queue['next_action'] = 'wait for Deno Deploy to update to webhook v4.10, then operator sends Telegram test to @BarberStaffBot'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
state = Path('governance/state/GATE4_FIX_V2_DEPLOY_PENDING_RECORD.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'GATE-4-FIX-V2-DEPLOY','trace_id':'gate4_fix_v2_deploy_pending_record','status':'waiting_deploy','release_pass':False,'patched_sha':'8cba218e7a842e7f8baf7d0a145b0e7978a0e93f','live_health_version':'4.9','expected_health_version':'4.10','workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'wait for Deno Deploy, then Telegram receipt test'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/GATE4_FIX_V2_DEPLOY_PENDING_RECORD.md')
report.write_text('# GATE-4-FIX-V2 | Deploy pending record' + NL + 'Status: waiting_deploy' + NL + 'Date: 2026-06-04' + NL + NL + 'Webhook patch is committed, but live Deno health still reports version 4.9. Telegram test must wait until Deno Deploy serves version 4.10 or latest commit is confirmed deployed.' + NL + NL + 'Patched SHA: 8cba218e7a842e7f8baf7d0a145b0e7978a0e93f' + NL + 'Record SHA source: c949c24d42cf364a1c2e1142ec7c8d1218b7be48' + NL + 'Workflow lock respected. No .github/workflows files touched.' + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
